description:
**Milestone:** KnowledgeStoreService Modularization

Create apps/server/src/services/knowledge-embedding-orchestrator.ts and move all embedding orchestration logic from KnowledgeStoreService: the embeddings table management, runBackgroundHype(), averageEmbeddings(), getHypeStatus(), and the EmbeddingService lifecycle. The ML model EmbeddingService stays as-is. KnowledgeStoreService delegates. After this phase, knowledge-store-service.ts should be under 300 lines — primarily schema/migration, initialization, and delegation.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/server/src/services/knowledge-store-service.ts
- apps/server/src/services/knowledge-embedding-orchestrator.ts
- apps/server/src/routes/knowledge/routes/hype-status.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] knowledge-embedding-orchestrator.ts exists with HyPE and embedding lifecycle
- [ ] knowledge-store-service.ts is under 300 lines
- [ ] HyPE background generation continues to work end-to-end
- [ ] getHypeStatus() returns correct counts
- [ ] npm run build:server succeeds
- [ ] npm run test:server passes

**Complexity:** large
